tool_args.label: Nostrand Avenue ADA Project
tool_args.raw_text: NYCT Nostrand Avenue ADA Project in Brooklyn - ADA Accessibility Updates at the Nostrand Avenue Station on the IND Fulton Street Line Project

payload.project_name: ADA Accessibility Updates at the Nostrand Avenue Station on the IND Fulton Street Line Project
payload.description: Installation of three new elevators, reconfiguration of station layout to support new vertical circulation, construction of new fare control areas, and critical state-of-good-repair work on station platforms including platform edges at Nostrand Avenue Station (IND Fulton Street Line). Property acquisition at 1242 Fulton Street for ADA elevator construction.

tool_args.label: MTA Railway-Highway Grade Crossing Engineering Assessment Contract
tool_args.raw_text: Contract award for independent multidisciplinary engineering assessments of MTA railway-highway grade crossings on an as-needed basis

payload.project_name: Engineering Assessment of MTA Railway-Highway Grade Crossings
payload.description: Competitively negotiated personal service contract with ABC Engineering of NY, P.C. d/b/a Benesch Engineering to provide independent multidisciplinary engineering assessments of MTA railway-highway grade crossings for a period of three years with two 1-year options (June 1, 2026–May 31, 2031) for a maximum not-to-exceed amount of $10,981,057.

tool_args.label: Penn Station Access Project - Bruckner Boulevard Property Acquisition
tool_args.raw_text: Acquisition of property along Bruckner Boulevard in the Bronx in support of the Penn Station Access Project

payload.description: Acquisition of property along Bruckner Boulevard between Southern Boulevard and East 144th Street in the Bronx for construction, operation and maintenance of an electric power substation. MTA C&D is modernizing portions of Amtrak's Hell Gate Line by realigning tracks, optimizing overhead catenary systems, building electrical power systems inclusive of substations, replacing and installing signal equipment, and constructing four new MNR passenger stations.

tool_args.label: FMTAC Annual Board Meeting - May 2026
tool_args.raw_text: The monthly MTA board meeting of May 20, 2026 will also be the annual board meeting of MTA's captive insurer, the First Mutual Transportation Assurance Company.

payload.description: Annual board meeting of MTA's captive insurer, First Mutual Transportation Assurance Company. The monthly MTA board meeting of May 20, 2026 also serves as the annual FMTAC board meeting.

tool_args.label: EDPL Public Hearing - Nostrand Avenue ADA Project
tool_args.raw_text: On April 13, 2026, the MTA held an EDPL public hearing to describe the public use, benefit and purpose of the Project

payload.event_name: EDPL Public Hearing - Nostrand Avenue ADA Project
payload.description: Eminent Domain Procedure Law public hearing for the ADA Accessibility Updates at the Nostrand Avenue Station on the IND Fulton Street Line Project. Written comments accepted until April 24, 2026.

tool_args.label: TBTA Payroll Mobility Tax BANs Series 2026B Issuance
tool_args.raw_text: In June 2026, TBTA expects to issue approximately $800 million of TBTA Payroll Mobility Tax Bond Anticipation Notes, Series 2026B

payload.event_name: TBTA Payroll Mobility Tax Bond Anticipation Notes, Series 2026B
payload.description: TBTA expects to issue approximately $800 million of TBTA Payroll Mobility Tax Bond Anticipation Notes, Series 2026B, priced through competitive bidding. Proceeds will finance transit and commuter projects in the approved capital programs.

tool_args.label: Revolving Line of Credit Program Reconfiguration
tool_args.raw_text: In April 2026, MTA Finance reconfigured its $1.3 billion revolving line of credit program

payload.event_name: Revolving Line of Credit Program Reconfiguration
payload.description: MTA Finance reconfigured its $1.3 billion revolving line of credit program, diversifying bank group from three to four institutions and adding Bank of New York Mellon. Expected to save approximately $1 million in annual fees.

tool_args.label: YTD April 2026 Operating Results
tool_args.raw_text: Net preliminary operating results for YTD April were favorable to the Adopted Budget by $196 million.

payload.claim_text: Net preliminary operating results for YTD April were favorable to the Adopted Budget by $196 million.
payload.description: Overall Latest Condition for YTD April 2026 compared with the Adopted Budget

tool_args.label: Passenger Revenue vs Pre-Pandemic
tool_args.raw_text: Passenger revenues remain significantly below pre-pandemic levels: YTD April passenger revenues were down $436 million (22%) compared with YTD April 2019.

payload.claim_text: Passenger revenues remain significantly below pre-pandemic levels: YTD April passenger revenues were down $436 million (22%) compared with YTD April 2019.
payload.description: Comparison of passenger revenue to pre-pandemic levels

tool_args.label: YTD Operating Revenue Variance
tool_args.raw_text: Operating Revenue for YTD April was $27 million (1%) unfavorable, comprising unfavorable passenger revenue of $25 million (1%), toll revenue of $1 million (less than 1%), and other operating revenue of $1 million (less than 1%).

payload.claim_text: Operating Revenue for YTD April was $27 million (1%) unfavorable, comprising unfavorable passenger revenue of $25 million (1%), toll revenue of $1 million (less than 1%), and other operating revenue of $1 million (less than 1%). For the month of April, Operating Revenue was $9 million (1%) favorable.
payload.description: YTD April 2026 Operating Revenue variance detail

tool_args.label: Operating Subsidies Variance
tool_args.raw_text: Operating Subsidies, which also reflect Investment Income, were favorable for YTD April by $186 million (6%).

payload.claim_text: Operating Subsidies, which also reflect Investment Income, were favorable for YTD April by $186 million (6%). Excluding Investment Income, subsidies directed to the operating budget were favorable by $165 million (5%). This was primarily driven by favorable results for Urban Tax and Payroll Mobility Tax (PMT). For April, Operating Subsidies excluding Investment Income were $34 million (6%) favorable.
payload.description: YTD April 2026 Operating Subsidies variance

tool_args.label: Total Resources Funding Operating Budget
tool_args.raw_text: YTD through April, total resources funding the operating budget, which include Operating Subsidies, B&T Surplus Transfer and Investment Income, were favorable by $280 million.

payload.claim_text: YTD through April, total resources funding the operating budget, which include Operating Subsidies, B&T Surplus Transfer and Investment Income, were favorable by $280 million.
payload.description: YTD April 2026 total resources funding the operating budget
